statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'no-git'); aws_profile=""; [ -n "$AWS_PROFILE" ] && aws_profile=$(printf " \033[33m[aws:%s]\033[0m" "$AWS_PROFILE"); tf_workspace=""; if [ -f "terraform.tfstate" ] || [ -f ".terraform/terraform.tfstate" ] || find . -maxdepth 3 -name "*.tf" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then workspace=$(terraform workspace show 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$workspace" ] && [ "$workspace" != "default" ] && tf_workspace=$(printf " \033[31m[tf:%s]\033[0m" "$workspace"); [ -n "$workspace" ] && [ "$workspace" = "default" ] && tf_workspace=$(printf " \033[90m[tf:default]\033[0m"); fi; printf "\033[36m%s\033[0m \033[32m(%s)\033[0m%s%s \033[35m%s\033[0m" "$(basename "$current_dir")" "$branch" "$aws_profile" "$tf_workspace" "$model"
